# Simulation and Monte Carlo Methods {#sec-simulation}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Apply Monte Carlo integration and simulation to OR problems
- Implement discrete-event simulation in Python
- Use surrogate models (Gaussian process, neural network) to replace expensive simulations
- Understand Bayesian optimization as simulation-based optimization
:::

## Introduction

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
